description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof design with multiple levels, including a rooftop terrace accessible by an exterior staircase. The facade is dominated by large glass windows, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property includes a paved driveway with several parked cars, a fenced backyard with a swimming pool, and a round trampoline. Palm trees and potted plants add greenery to the exterior, while the perimeter is enclosed by a dark fence for privacy. The structure is primarily constructed from concrete, glass, and metal, with sleek blue-tinted railings and minimalist lines. Outdoor living spaces, such as the rooftop terrace and poolside area, enhance the urban lifestyle appeal of this residence.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, rooftop terrace, pool, and fenced yard, featuring sleek lines and urban landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, large glass windows, palm trees, and a paved driveway with cars parked under a covered area.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the rooftop terrace with blue railings, exterior staircase, trampoline, and multiple parked cars.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the fenced backyard, swimming pool, grouped windows, and additional outdoor seating area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the pool, privacy fence, and a mix of window sizes, with palm trees visible near the front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on the front and side facades
